sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28769" key="du/sbolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠ´σ-βολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28769.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throwing badly</tr_>, esp. with dice, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:94" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.94</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
